comments: Contains a 40 minute segment of Dio at this year's Monsters Of Rock festival; the band's first ever UK performance.
The setter of this week's FNC has an unpronounceable surname which Tommy doesn't even attempt but instead refers to as John 'Tish'!

track_listing.track: Break The Chains (LP - Tokyo Blade) Powerstation
Recorded at the Monsters Of Rock Festival
Shadow Of California (LP - The Revolution By Night) CBS
Don't Stop (LP - Sucker For A Pretty Face) Elektra
Kids In Action (LP - Kerrang! Vertigo Album) Vertigo
Dans Les Griffes D'Attila (LP - Coup De Metal) Rave-On
Blues Breaker (Dedicated To EC) (LP - Star Fleet Project) EMI
